questions.correctText: access to raw materials such as rubber, gold, and diamonds

questions.correctText: the mass production of steel

questions.correctText: African leaders themselves

the overwhelming military advantage of industrialized European armies

questions.correctText: Bolshevik or October Revolution

questions.correctText: Anschluss

Only nations may be punished for war crimes

modernize the Chinese economy along capitalist lines
